title: lolium perenne var. aristatum
intro: Lolium perenne var. aristatum, also known as perennial ryegrass or aristate ryegrass, is a variety of grass that belongs to the Lolium perenne species. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lolium perenne var. aristatum include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
